title: evolvulus bogotensis
intro: Evolvulus bogotensis, also known as Bogotá dwarf morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Evolvulus bogotensis include its ability to reduce fever, soothe respiratory tract infections, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Evolvulus bogotensis can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, or used as a tincture or extract, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
